gate.description: Day-0 GATE — quick validation (2 epochs, small dataset)

gate_micro.description: Smallest possible GATE run — used to isolate a native fine-tune worker crash seen on a cloud GPU during testing. 1 epoch, 20 pairs, microBatchSize 1, checkpoint every step so a resume can pick up immediately after a crash.

standard.description: Standard training — balanced speed and quality (3 epochs)

deep.description: Deep training — maximum quality (5 epochs, full augmentation)

selectionGuide.firstRun: Use 'gate' to validate fine-tuning works on your hardware
selectionGuide.production: Use 'standard' for the best balance of speed and quality
selectionGuide.finalBuild: Use 'deep' before submission for maximum quality
selectionGuide.weakFinetune: Use 'style_only' if factual accuracy is good but style is weak
